hypothesis: Hypothesis: Integration of real-time in situ spectroscopic monitoring (e.g., Raman or ATR-FTIR) of the cathode-electrolyte interface into the AdaCarbon platform will enable direct measurement of local pH and carbonate speciation dynamics, allowing the Bayesian optimizer to discover operating conditions that decouple the trade-off between JCO and UCO2 by dynamically modulating electrolyte composition during electrolysis rather than maintaining static conditions.
